The '''32nd Cruiser Squadron''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[S'lixike]]. It was part of the forces commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Rogar Garret]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Anton Standish]].
